title: Record hard68 abs60k and swarm300 densify

# Hard68 Abs60 Swarm300 Contract

## Hard 68
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.68 so long sessions stop earlier before attention rot

## Abs 60k
absolute trigger tokens default to 60000 so large-context models reclaim sooner

## Swarm 300
swarm expert bodies default to 300 chars, total 8k, inline 50 for denser multi-agent handoffs

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/boundary/status vitest
